cases.title: Imported Example - Suspicious Email Review
cases.summary: Synthetic selected-case snapshot showing how exported email, process, and network observations can be normalized into a complete SOC case.

affectedEntities.description: Synthetic mailbox that received the suspicious message.

affectedEntities.role: Endpoint where follow-on execution was observed
affectedEntities.description: Synthetic workstation used for the import example.
Synthetic defanged URL used to demonstrate artifact relationships.

evidence.title: Suspicious email delivered to mailbox
evidence.detail: Synthetic gateway export shows an email with an external sender, finance-themed subject, and a defanged link.

evidence.title: Office process spawned script interpreter
evidence.detail: Synthetic endpoint telemetry shows a document viewer process launching powershell.exe with a download-style command.

evidence.title: Endpoint contacted defanged URL host
evidence.detail: Synthetic proxy log shows WS-SYNTH-022 requesting hxxps://payload.example.test/download after script execution.

timeline.title: Suspicious email delivered
timeline.description: Email gateway recorded delivery of the synthetic suspicious message.

timeline.title: Script interpreter launched
timeline.description: Endpoint telemetry recorded Office-to-PowerShell process behavior.

timeline.title: Network request followed execution
timeline.description: Proxy telemetry recorded a request to the defanged URL host.

timeline.title: Mailbox and host queued for review
timeline.description: Analyst marked the mailbox and workstation for containment validation.

analystQuestions.question: Did the recipient interact with the link or attachment?
analystQuestions.answer: Endpoint telemetry indicates script execution shortly after message delivery.
analystQuestions.rationale: Process and proxy evidence align within the same synthetic investigation window.

analystQuestions.question: Are additional recipients affected?
analystQuestions.rationale: Message search results have not yet been imported into this synthetic example.

findings.title: Phishing delivery led to suspicious script execution
findings.description: Email, process, and proxy evidence support a sequence from suspicious message delivery to endpoint script execution and outbound connection.

mitreMappings.rationale: The synthetic email evidence includes a defanged URL that appears to initiate the follow-on activity.
Endpoint telemetry shows PowerShell execution following suspicious email interaction.

recommendations.title: Quarantine related messages and review endpoint
recommendations.description: Search for matching synthetic message indicators, quarantine any matching messages, and review the endpoint for persistence or downloaded artifacts.

recommendations.title: Collect full message headers and proxy context
recommendations.description: Import complete email headers and related proxy events to close remaining investigation gaps.

closure.rationale: The synthetic evidence chain supports suspicious email delivery leading to script execution. Additional recipient scoping remains open.
closure.recommendedAction: Complete message search and endpoint review before final closure.
closure.impactSummary: One synthetic mailbox and one synthetic workstation are currently in scope.
